name: McpVanguard Proxy
description: Enterprise-grade security gateway for the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Protects servers from malicious agent intent.

VANGUARD_API_KEY.description: Required: Secret key for SSE clients. Must be sent in X-Api-Key header.

MCP_SERVER_COMMAND.description: The shell command to spawn your target MCP server (e.g. 'npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem /path/to/data')

VANGUARD_VEX_URL.description: Optional: VEX Protocol Flight Recorder API (Immutable Audit)

VANGUARD_VEX_KEY.description: Optional: JWT Key for VEX Auditor integration

OLLAMA_API_BASE.description: Optional: Remote LLM base URL for L2 Semantic intent scoring

VANGUARD_REDIS_URL.description: Optional: Redis connection string for L3 Stateful Behavior tracing

VANGUARD_DISABLE_UVLOOP.description: Safety: Set to 1 if encountering uvloop subprocess issues

VANGUARD_SERVER_MANIFEST_FILE.description: Path to the upstream server SBOM manifest for integrity verification.
